business.name: B Graham Electrical Contractors
business.tagline: Licensed electrical work that actually lasts

hero.headline: Wilmington's *straight-shooting* electrician
hero.subheadline: No surprises, no up-selling. Just the electrical work you need, quoted on the spot and done right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From breaker repairs to full electrical projects, we show up ready to work

services.title: Breaker Box Repair & Replacement
services.description: When your AC won't kick on or outlets go dead, we track down the problem fast. No hunting around — we know exactly what to look for.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: Need power where there isn't any? We run the wire and install outlets that work the first time you flip the switch.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: Flickering lights, tripped breakers, or that outlet that just stopped working? We'll figure out what's wrong and fix it.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Work
services.description: Business electrical issues can't wait. We handle commercial repairs and installations with the same no-nonsense approach.

about.heading: Real electrical contractors in Wilmington, NC
about.body: We're the guys who show up in company trucks, tell you exactly what needs doing, and quote you on the spot. Our work speaks for itself — ask any of our neighbors around Wilmington who they call when the lights go out.

reviews.name: Paul Z.
reviews.text: Owner showed up in a company truck, explained everything that needed doing, and quoted me right there. Professional from start to finish.

reviews.name: Al R.
reviews.text: Fixed my AC breaker box super quick and efficient. Would absolutely recommend to anyone.

reviews.name: John W.
reviews.text: Very professional and helpful with project suggestions. Quality work at a reasonable price.

reviews.name: Missy R.
reviews.text: Competitive pricing and professional work. Highly recommend these guys.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Wilmington and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local electrical contractors who know the neighborhoods

cta.heading: Ready for electrical work that actually gets done?
cta.body: Call now for an on-the-spot quote. We show up when we say we will, in company trucks, ready to work.
